name: Hot Fudge Sundae Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In an ungreased square pan, 9-inch X 9-inch X 2 inches, stir together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. Mix in milk, oil, and vanilla with a fork until smooth.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Spread batter evenly in the pan.
6. Sprinkle with brown sugar and 1/4 cup cocoa.
7. Pour hot water over the batter.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Allow to stand for 15 minutes.
10. Spoon into dessert dishes or cut into squares.
11. Invert each square onto a dessert plate.
12. Top with ice cream and spoon sauce over each square.
